With final markets settling across the Hyperliquid ecosystem we would like to remind our users of the pending shutdown of USDH.

HyperLend recommends that users repay any outstanding USDH debt and convert any supplied USDH to USDC.

See QT for methods to convert USDH.

Sunsetting USDH on HyperLend

In light of todays announcement that USDH will begin winding down operations on Hyperliquid we have made the decision to begin the process of sunsetting USDH borrowing and lending on HyperLend.

Within 48 hours users will no longer be able to supply

the most important question about any lending venue is when a position goes bad, who pays for it

in a monolithic pool, everyone who supplied does, no matter what asset they thought they were underwriting. in an isolated market, the loss stays where it started

that one design
which solana perps protocol allows long/short STRC?

correlated pair liquidity is how passive capital earns market making income without taking a directional position

that's yield on an asset you were holding anyway, at minimal added risk

think liquidity
